= VimWiki Sample Document =

== Introduction ==

This is a paragraph with *bold*, _italic_, and `inline code` text.
It also has ~~strikethrough~~, ^superscript^, and ,,subscript,, markup.

== Lists ==

* First item
* Second item with *bold*
* Third item

1. Ordered first
2. Ordered second
3. Ordered third

* [ ] Unchecked task
* [X] Checked task

== Links and Images ==

Visit [[https://example.com|Example Site]] for more info.

{{image.png|Alt text}}

== Code ==

{{{python
def hello():
    print("Hello, VimWiki!")
}}}

Inline code: `x = 42` and also {{{more code}}}.

== Blockquote ==

> This is a quoted passage.

== Table ==

| Name  | Age | City     |
| Alice |  30 | New York |
| Bob   |  25 | London   |

== Definition List ==

; Term
: The definition of the term.
; Another Term
: Another definition.

----

=== Heading 3 ===
==== Heading 4 ====

End of document.
